title: End Survival
description: End Survival challenges your surviving skills as you enter the dimension of The End and are forced to live out the rest of your days there and survive the harsh environment! At least, until you defeat the Ender Dragon that is...
body:
# End Survival

This modpack is exactly as the name suggests, you survive in the end! You begin your journey when you start your new world in the end dimension.

Better End as well as a few other mods expand the end dimension that we know from vanilla to a survivable place to live! Maybe even thrivable...

Gather brand new resources, explore new biomes, gear up and upgrade your equipment in this new extremely harsh environment! Don't think it's easy, because it's NOT...

I can highly recommend playing with the [Better End City](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/better-end-city-for-better-end-by-ichphilipp/) datapack by IchPhilipp!

This modpack was originally made for my YouTube series [End Survival](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLir0xFpj1ZKO5peL3jJCJpIAvC28EwvUT) which has now ended.

Any support on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/BinaryVigilante) is greatly appreciated :)

## Credits

This modpack contains Xaero's Minimap & Xaero's World Map mod:
 - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap
 - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map
